zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston於1423年出生在英國德比夏爾霍洛韋時，他的父親Thomas Babington47歲，母親Isabel De Thick22歲。他於1456年3月18日與Lady Isabel De Bradbourne在英國德比夏爾德瑟其可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他於1485年登記服兵役。他去世於1485年8月22日在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston于1423年出生在英国德比夏爾霍洛韋时，他的父亲Thomas Babington47岁，母亲Isabel De Thick22岁。他于1456年3月18日与Lady Isabel De Bradbourne在英国德比夏爾德瑟其可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他于1485年登记服兵役。他去世于1485年8月22日在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston was born in 1423, in Holloway, Derbyshire, England, his father, Thomas Babington, was 47 and his mother, Isabel De Thick, was 22. He married Lady Isabel De Bradbourne on 18 March 1456, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 10 daughters. He registered for military service in 1485. He died on 22 August 1485, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston est né en 1423, à Holloway, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Babington, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabel De Thick, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel De Bradbourne le 18 mars 1456, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 10 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1485. Il est décédé le 22 août 1485, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England: Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston 1423 in Holloway, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Babington 47 und seine Mutter Isabel De Thick 22. Er hat am 18. März 1456 in Dethick, Derbyshire, England Lady Isabel De Bradbourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er hat sich 1485 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 22. August 1485 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston è nato il nel 1423 nel Holloway, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Babington, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Isabel De Thick, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel De Bradbourne il 18 marzo 1456, nel Dethick, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 10 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1485. Morì il 22 agosto 1485, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingstonが1423年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアホーロワイで生まれた時，父Thomas Babingtonは47歳，母Isabel De Thickは22歳であった。1456年3月18日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックでLady Isabel De Bradbourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年に兵役登録をした。彼は1485年8月22日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston(이)가 1423년 영국 더비실르 홀로아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Babington(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel De Thick(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1456년 3월 18일 영국 더비실르 데스이c크에서 Lady Isabel De Bradbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1485년 8월 22일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston nasceu em 1423, em Holloway, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Babington, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabel De Thick, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel De Bradbourne em 18 de março de 1456, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1485. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1485, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ro.Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England: Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston родился в 1423 г. в местности холлоуеи, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Babington было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel De Thick, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel De Bradbourne 18 марта 1456 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 10 дочерей. В 1485 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 22 августа 1485 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston nació en 1423, en Holloway, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Babington, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabel De Thick, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel De Bradbourne el 18 de marzo de 1456, en Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 10 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1485. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1485, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
